overall.description: A stationary first-person view inside a luxurious cyberpunk apartment bedroom at night, featuring modern wooden architecture, floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking a foggy neon-lit cityscape, and a holographic display cycling through various futuristic advertisements. The scene is from Cyberpunk 2077 with high-fidelity game engine rendering.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury apartment bedroom with holographic entertainment display

events.description: holographic display transitions from blue interface to colorful abstract animation
display switches to All Foods advertisement sequence with yellow background
display cycles through final set of product advertisements and anime content

agents.ego_description: standing still in the apartment, watching the holographic display cycle through various futuristic advertisements

entered.detail: modern bed with white sheets and pillows in the foreground
tall windows revealing foggy night cityscape with distant neon lights
large curved holographic screen displaying rotating advertisements
curved wooden panel ceiling with integrated ambient lighting
small table with magazine or book placed on it
animal print blanket draped over furniture

segments.scene_description: The camera remains stationary in a luxurious cyberpunk apartment bedroom, featuring a large bed in the foreground and floor-to-ceiling windows showing a foggy city nightscape. A holographic display on the right cycles through various advertisements including abstract animations, All Foods branding, and product commercials. The room has a warm wooden slat ceiling and modern ambient lighting throughout the sequence.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a stationary first-person perspective within a luxurious cyberpunk bedroom that remains constant while its internal holographic elements evolve. It begins with a view of a large bed in the foreground, framed by a warm wooden slat ceiling and floor-to-ceiling windows that reveal a foggy, neon-lit city nightscape. As the camera lingers, the focus shifts toward a holographic display on the right which continuously cycles through a series of futuristic advertisements. The scene then transitions through various visual prompts, moving from abstract animations to All Foods branding and specific product commercials. Finally, the ambient lighting persists in a steady glow, anchoring the shifting digital imagery against the stillness of the modern apartment.
